// validation.js
const { ethers } = require("ethers");

function validatePrivateKey(key, network) {
  try {
    const wallet = new ethers.Wallet(key);
    console.log(`✅ ${network}: Valid — Address: ${wallet.address}`);
    return true;
  } catch (e) {
    console.log(`❌ ${network}: Invalid — ${e.message}`);
    return false;
  }
}
